title: strychnos mattogrossensis
intro: Strychnos mattogrossensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Loganiaceae, native to the Brazilian state of Mato Grosso, and is also known as the Mattos tree. The plant has been studied for its medicinal properties, which include potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Research suggests that Strychnos mattogrossensis may have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting against certain bacterial infections. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant have been used in folk medicine to treat various conditions, but more studies are needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
